    • Module contents

Submodules

ncitools.cli module

Command-line interface for NCITools – Non-Covalent Interaction analysis.

Subcommands:

geom Detect hydrogen bonds from molecular geometry. top Perform topological (AIM/NCI) analysis from a cube file. cube Generate electron density cube file from a PDB using DFT (PySCF). fix Fix PDB structure, add hydrogens, optionally optimize them. convert Convert between file formats (e.g., PDB → XYZ).

ncitools.constants module

Atomic radii and conversion constants for non‑covalent interaction analysis.

RADII : Covalent radii (Cambridge Structural Database) BONDI : van der Waals radii (Bondi, with H from Rowland & Taylor) bohr_to_angstrom : Conversion factor 0.52918 Å/Bohr

ncitools.correlations module

Energy estimation correlations for hydrogen bonds. All functions return energy in kcal/mol.

ncitools.correlations.Afonin_ED_2024(rho)[source]

Energy from ρ – linear fit (Afonin, J. Mol. Model. 2024).

ncitools.correlations.Afonin_linear_LaplED_2024(laplacian)[source]

Energy from ∇²ρ – linear fit (Afonin).

ncitools.correlations.Afonin_quadratic_LaplED_2024(laplacian)[source]

Energy from ∇²ρ – quadratic fit (Afonin).

ncitools.correlations.Emamian_2019(rho)[source]

Energy from ρ – general correlation (Emamian, J. Comp. Chem. 2019). Returns positive kcal/mol.

ncitools.correlations.Mata_ED_2011(rho)[source]

Energy from ρ (e/bohr³) – general correlation. Mata et al., Chem. Phys. Lett. 2011; returns kcal/mol.

ncitools.correlations.Mata_LaplED_2011(laplacian)[source]

Energy from Laplacian ∇²ρ (e/bohr⁵) – general correlation. returns kcal/mol.

ncitools.correlations.Nikolaienko_2012(rho, contact_type='N-H...O')[source]

Energy from ρ, differentiated by H‑bond type. Contact types: O-H…O, O-H…N, N-H…O, O-H…C. Returns kcal/mol.

ncitools.correlations.Rozenberg_2000(dist, contact_type)[source]

Energy from H···A distance (Å) for O–H···O or N–H···O. Eq. from Rozenberg, PCCP 2000; returns kcal/mol.

ncitools.correlations.Rozenberg_2014(rho)[source]

Energy from electron density ρ (e/bohr³) at BCP. Rozenberg, RSC Adv. 2014; returns kcal/mol.

ncitools.correlations.Rudenko_2026_ED(rho, contact_type='C-H...O')[source]

Energy from ρ for C–H···O and C–H···N H‑bonds (NCI lab). Returns positive kcal/mol.

ncitools.correlations.correlation_1(rho, contact_type)[source]

Default energy estimator: uses Rudenko for C–H···X, else Emamian.

ncitools.utils module

Utility functions for file I/O, geometry, and element symbols.

ncitools.utils.angle(atom1, atom2, atom3)[source]

Angle (degrees) between three points (each as [x,y,z]).

ncitools.utils.distance(atom1, atom2)[source]

Euclidean distance between two points.

ncitools.utils.get_symbol(z)[source]

Return element symbol for atomic number Z (common elements).

ncitools.utils.hb_energy(hb)[source]

Compute H‑bond energy from distance using Rozenberg 2000. hb dict must contain ‘dist_HA’ (Å) and ‘Type’ (e.g. ‘NHO’).

ncitools.utils.read_input(file)[source]

Read molecular structure file (PDB or other ASE formats). Returns (filename, extension, directory, ASE Atoms object).
